ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/readme-typing-svg
Language: php
⚡ Dynamically generated, customizable SVG that gives the appearance of typing and deleting text for use on your profile page, repositories, or website.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreshRSS/FreshRSS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php
A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HiEventsDev/Hi.Events
Language: php
Open-source event management and ticket selling platform — perfect for concerts, conferences, and everything in between 🎟️ If you find this project helpful, please consider giving us a star ⭐️

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
Language: php
Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openemr/openemr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openemr/openemr
Language: php
The most popular open source electronic health records and medical practice management solution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: phpmyadmin/phpmyadmin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phpmyadmin/phpmyadmin
Language: php
A web interface for MySQL and MariaDB

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rectorphp/rector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rectorphp/rector
Language: php
Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Symfony AI is a set of components that integrate AI capabilities into PHP applications
